# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'artifactUrl', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the build artifact to download')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "curl -O ${params.artifactUrl}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // productionServers is a list of your production server IP/Hostname
                    def productionServers = ['192.168.0.1','192.168.0.2']

                    productionServers.each { server ->
                        sh "scp -ri ~/.ssh/id_rsa ${params.artifactUrl} jenkins@${server}:/path/to/deploy/folder"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
